{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221949020DBAF15994B7E0566CCC"}"},"total":651},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7490957457876108057","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情挺好的，目前为止，沈女主和苏男主还挺甜，速速更新"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744126558,"group_id":"7470853002203515929","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx4EeopIbRVxHZ7VWawpRZN9Z+34cFKmf8R2ZjaiNDRi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6bdbeed7d2f34229b2488f443910319f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710350&x-signature=ioT5MdYoKN6tcZmifIUQsWDhOto%3D","user_id":"2110658537064237","user_name":"番茄首富ԅ(¯ㅂ¯ԅ"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2110658537064237","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7470853002203515929","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食】+【日常+【搞笑】+【轻松】
意外获得美食系统，苏晨阳选择在大学门口摆摊了，惊艳的厨艺就在网上爆火。
慕名而来的食客还没吃爽，隔天就发现苏晨阳到了别的大学门口摆摊。
来到新的地点，食客问：“老板，你怎么换位置了？”
苏晨阳：“上一个大学里面，没有好看的女生。”
食客无语了：“这个大学呢？”
苏晨阳：“有个女生倒是挺好看的。”
结果没两天，苏晨阳又换大学摆摊了，让吃上瘾的食客很恼火。
食客：“怎么又换位置，你不是说有个女生挺好看的吗？”
苏晨阳：“性格太高冷了，撩不动。”
食客：“两天你就放弃，你怎么可能追的到女朋友！”
苏晨阳：“只有舔狗才会死皮赖脸！”
很快，苏晨阳又换位置了。
食客：“这次为什么换位置？”
苏晨阳：“说要考验我的态度。我又不是舔狗，凭什么让她考验？”
随着苏晨阳不断更换大学摆摊，全网的食客对苏晨阳又爱又恨。
“我怎么感觉老板每次换位置的理由，都是在骂我呢？”
“舔狗不是人吗？为什么老板要挂在嘴边骂呢！”
本书又名：《摊位是否流动，全看人家校花漂亮不漂亮？》《每次流动摊位，舔狗都要被破防！》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ocf373ba3106602ac6588184a1288de20~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"别说读书太苦","author_id":"","book_id":"7470853002203515929","book_name":"哪个大学校花漂亮，就去哪里摆摊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7470853048181473817","read_count":"13177","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1016224"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"460","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食,校花,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8422bd8874e232f6c45cf1374d6e16d6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364142&x-signature=ukGizAe8CloffztSfGa%2Bsu4vtBo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4261344526471245","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"61"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221949020DBAF15994B7E0566CCC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评" },"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14988,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":18727},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496552905505932056","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材新颖，很不错的一本小说，再加上其中的恋爱观真的很适合现在的年轻人，现在谈恋爱真的太卷了，所谓的快餐式恋爱就像作者大大写的那样，在没有了解三观和人品之前无脑怼着颜值冲，没成之前被人说舔狗，成了之后过得还难受，生活质量降低了不说，等分手后才发现自己是小丑🤡。带着原则去谈恋爱才会遇到自己的灵魂伴侣（以上仅个人感想）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745436025,"group_id":"7470853002203515929","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"别在失去之后才后悔，也别在拥有之时不珍惜。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0n9ktH3lZ489IZ9hJkqe7E=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9e72748c9d5c4bebafb1bea0dd3002a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708216&x-signature=6PJBq9jZm1UPm8nZt0uwys%2BHJ7g%3D","user_id":"527405291944808","user_name":"林郁蛰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"527405291944808","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1809176944,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"sv
